content.en:
"An ordinary Ancient Demon-level powerhouse!"

Yas Gu Mo sensed Ye Tian's existence, and immediately smiled slightly, preparing to kill Ye Tian.

He is also considered a very good combat power among the top Ancient Demon-level powerhouses, and it shouldn't be a problem to kill an ordinary Ancient Demon-level powerhouse.

In an instant, he urged the Ultimate Rule Realm, preparing to use the Ultimate Rule Realm to crush Ye Tian.

However.

Just when his Ultimate Rule Realm enveloped Ye Tian, one Ultimate Rule Realm after another suddenly emerged from Ye Tian's body.

In an instant, his Ultimate Rule Realm was crushed by Ye Tian.

Rumble!!!!!

Six Ultimate Rule Domains were suppressed, and five of them were Space-Time Ultimate Rule Domains, and the space-time Ultimate Particles around him were all solidified, making him unable to contend with them.

"It can't !!"

Yas Ancient Demon couldn't believe that an ordinary Ancient Demon level powerhouse would actually urge the Six Ultimate Rule Realms, this was unreasonable!

"Maybe he's just a special in the Ultimate Rule Realm, and his real strength isn't very good?"

With this in mind, Yasgu Demon tried his best to unleash his top-notch ultimate arcane technique and kill Ye Tian.

And at this moment, Ye Tian urged the Mystic Method of Ten Thousand Forms, as well as the Mystic Technique of Ah Luo's Golden Body Form, and the Secret Technique of Ah Luo's Arm Form, and there was no idea of hiding it at all.

Immediately afterward, he used his hand as a sword, turned into the sword light of Aromu, and cast this pinnacle ultimate arcane.

Burst!

Ye Tian ran through with one hand, directly tearing apart Yasgu Demon's body, shattering his body.

Immediately after, the ultimate particles on Yasgu's body shattered.

With just one blow, the Yasgu Demon was battered and was about to fall.

"The pinnacle ultimate arcane, there are so many form secret methods, or self-created form secret methods......"

Yasgu Demon showed despair, how could such a demon be encountered by him!

If he knew that Ye Tian was so powerful, he would definitely flee as soon as possible, and he wouldn't dare to compete with Ye Tian at all!

Burst!

Ye Tian attacked again and directly obliterated the Yas Gu Demon.

"The top ancient demon-level powerhouse is also average, and I will kill him in two moves!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

However, he didn't have too much pride, the strength of the top ancient demon-level powerhouse who was truly demonic was definitely far superior to him, but in the Huoxi space-time battlefield, the combat power he exerted was really not necessarily stronger than him. "

After killing the Yas Ancient Demon, Ye Tian found that he had increased the power of luck by twenty copies of the Ancient Demon Pillar of Time and Space, which was much more than the power of luck obtained by killing an ordinary Ancient Demon-level powerhouse.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian continued to kill some ordinary Ancient Demon-level powerhouses, and was occasionally able to kill a few top-level Ancient Demon-level powerhouses.

With the passage of time, more and more ancient demon-level powerhouses have fallen in the major main divisions, and many ancient demon-level powerhouses are afraid and want to leave the Huoxi space-time battlefield.

However, during this period, any ancient demon-level powerhouse was only allowed to enter and not to leave, so it was so easy to leave.

After all, the battle of luck involving the Ancient Demon Pillar of Time and Space, even if it was the sacrifice of a large number of Ancient Demon-level powerhouses, it was nothing to those main departments.

If you sacrifice a large number of Ancient Demon-level powerhouses to be able to cultivate an Ultimate Ancient Demon, it will be worth it.

And Ye Tian killed a large number of ancient demon-level powerhouses, and the power of luck obtained was also increasing.

After a long time.

On this day, Ye Tian's luck broke 10,000 copies.

......

Aromu Fortress.

The Stygian Ancient Demon came back from outside, she was a little injured, she was besieged by three peak Ancient Demon level powerhouses, and the strength of those three was second only to her, but they joined forces to crush her.

However, she had a lot of hole cards and escaped successfully.

Nowadays, not only are there frequent killings between ordinary ancient demon powerhouses and top ancient demon-level powerhouses, but also between peak ancient demon-level powerhouses.

After all, killing a peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouse of another main department, the increased power of luck is massive!

Therefore, all the peak ancient demon-level powerhouses were targeted, and everyone wanted to kill the peak ancient demon-level powerhouses.

Fortunately, the strength of the peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouses is extremely strong, and many of them have reached the limit of the peak Ancient Demon-level combat power, and there are many life-saving means, so they are not easy to kill.

"Look at how much luck I have!"

The ancient demon-level powerhouses corresponding to these silk threads were some of the ancient demon-level powerhouses she recruited.

"The number is small, and among the ancient demon-level powerhouses I have recruited, six have fallen!" the Stygian Ancient Demon frowned.

You know, she recruited some very demonic ordinary ancient demon-level powerhouses and some top ancient demon-level powerhouses, but she didn't expect some of them to fall.

Of course, even if those six fell, the power of luck they had accumulated before could be obtained by her.

Suddenly.

She noticed Ye Tian's power of luck.

"What, the luck power of this ordinary ancient demon-level powerhouse has broken 10,000 pieces!!"

The Ancient Demon was shocked.

Even if it is a top-notch ancient demon-level powerhouse, it is difficult to achieve such a record!

"It's him!"

The Ancient Demon recognized it, this was the heavens, and she was very optimistic about an Ancient Demon-level powerhouse.

But now it seems that she still underestimated Ye Tian.

Ye Tian was the second on the Emperor List before, but even Amusha, who was the first on the Emperor List before, has only accumulated hundreds of Qi Luck powers, but Ye Tian has broken 10,000 copies.

"The strength of the sky should be much stronger than that of Amusha, if there is not much luck in the difference, it can also be said to be luck, but the difference is so huge, it is not luck, but the gap in strength!"

The Stygian Ancient Demon smiled, maybe Ye Tian could give her more surprises.

Perhaps, Ye Tian can really muster together the power of 100,000 pieces of luck. (Dede Zhao)

But if she met such a requirement, she would have to give Ye Tian an Ultimate Ancient Demon Inheritance.

"The Ultimate Ancient Demon Inheritance is the Ultimate Ancient Demon Inheritance, if he really does it, he also deserves this inheritance!"

The Ancient Demon Secret Path.

Another period of time passed, and Ye Tian's fame began to spread, because sometimes, he couldn't kill all the enemies, and there would be ancient demon-level powerhouses who used special treasures to escape.

Therefore, his strength was exposed.

At this time, many top Ancient Demon-level powerhouses were afraid that they wanted to kill him.

This day.

Ye Tian set out from the Arrow Mu Fortress again, wanting to go to other territories to find suitable targets to hunt.

Rumble!!!!

Three auras locked him from a distant place, and they were three top-notch Ancient Demon-level powerhouses, each of which had a breath far superior to the top-level Ancient Demon-level powerhouses he had killed in the past.

Obviously, these three are here specifically to kill him!
